sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 모건스탠리는 2분기 순매출 168억 달러, EPS 2.13달러를 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 순매출 168억 달러와 주당순이익(EPS) 2.13달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 성장세를 보였습니다.
자산관리 부문에서 590억 달러의 순신규자산 유입을 달성하며 총 고객 자산 8조 2,000억 달러를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 분기 보통주 배당금을 주당 1.00달러로 인상하고 자본 배분 유연성을 확보했습니다.
기관 증권 부문은 주식 사업의 강세와 고객 활동 증가에 힘입어 76억 달러의 순매출을 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 순이익은 35억 달러로 전년 동기 31억 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
자산관리 부문 순매출은 78억 달러, 영업이익률은 28.3%를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 자산관리 부문의 순신규자산 유입 속도와 시장 변동성에 따른 기관 증권 부문의 수익 지속 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2q25msearningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Morgan Stanley Second Quarter 2025 Earnings Results Morgan Stanley Reports Net Revenues of $16.8 Billion, EPS of $2.13 and ROTCE of 18.2% NEW YORK, July 16, 2025 – Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today reported net revenues of $16.8 billion for the second quarter ended June 30, 2025 compared with $15.0 billion a year ago. Net income applicable to Morgan Stanley was $3.5 billion, or $2.13 per diluted share, 1 compared with $3.1 billion, or $1.82 per diluted share, 1 for the same period a year ago. Ted Pick, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, said, “Morgan Stanley delivered another strong quarter. Six sequential quarters of consistent earnings – $2.02  Normalized numeric aliases: $16.8 Billion = 168억 달러; $16.8 billion = 168억 달러; $15.0 billion = 150억 달러; $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $3.1 billion = 31억 달러; $16.8 = 16.8달러; $2.13 = 2.13달러; $15.0 = 15.0달러; $3.1 = 3.1달러; $2.60 = 2.60달러; $1.82 = 1.82달러; $2.02 = 2.02달러; $1.88 = 1.88달러; $2.22 = 2.22달러.

ies. Wealth continues to deliver, adding $59 billion of net new assets and $43 billion of fee-based flows. Total client assets across Wealth and Investment Management reached $8.2 trillion. We announced an increase of our quarterly common stock dividend to $1.00 per share with flexibility to deploy incremental capital. The management team is executing across the Integrated Firm, acting as a trusted advisor to clients and driving durable growth and long-term returns for our shareholders.” Financial Summary notes 2 and 3 Firm ($ millions, except per shar  Normalized numeric aliases: $59 billion = 590억 달러; $43 billion = 430억 달러; $8.2 trillion = 8조 2,000억 달러; $59 = 59달러; $43 = 43달러; $8.2 = 8.2달러; $1.00 = 1.00달러; $196 = 196달러; $7,190 = 7,190달러; $4,074 = 4,074달러; $61.59 = 61.59달러; 6,460 million = 64억 6,000만 달러; 3,539 million = 35억 3,900만 달러; 4,784 million = 47억 8,400만 달러; 4,409 million = 44억 900만 달러; 4,622 million = 46억 2,200만 달러; 4,074 million = 40억 7,400만 달러; 3,076 million = 30억 7,600만 달러.

t half of the year. notes 2 and 4 • The Firm expense efficiency ratio was 70% for the first half of the year benefiting from our scale and disciplined expense management. notes 3 and 8 and 19 • The Standardized Common Equity Tier 1 capital ratio was 15.0%. 16 • Institutional Securities reported net revenues of $7.6 billion reflecting strong performance in our Markets businesses on higher client activity, with notable strength in Equity. • Wealth Management delivered a pre-tax margin of 28.3% for the quarter. 7 Net revenues of $7.8 billion reflect strong asset management revenues, higher levels of client activity and the positive impact of DCP. 5 The business demonstrated continued strength with net new assets of $59 billion and fee-based asset flows of $43 billion for the quarter  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.6 billion = 76억 달러; $7.8 billion = 78억 달러; $59 billion = 590억 달러; $43 billion = 430억 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $7.6 = 7.6달러; $7.8 = 7.8달러; $59 = 59달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $43 = 43달러.
